title: Coinbase CEO Flags Huge Finance Shift As SEC Delays Blockchain Plans
description: SEC delays tokenized stock and blockchain asset plans after Wall Street pushback, pressuring crypto-linked assets and equities.

title: Robinhood’s WonderFi Deal And Crypto Leadership Exit Raise New Questions
description:
Regulators in Canada have approved Robinhood Markets' (NasdaqGS:HOOD) acquisition of WonderFi, clearing the way for the deal to close.
The transaction is expected to extend Robinhood's programmable finance and crypto trading presence beyond its US platform into the Canadian market.
Separately, the chief operating officer of Robinhood Crypto is departing as the company works through earnings weakness and adjusts its crypto focus.

Robinhood built its brand around app based trading for stocks,...

title: Moomoo Parent Futu Crashes 28% After China Proposes $271 Million Penalty Over Alleged Unlicensed Operations
description: Futu Holdings Ltd.‘s (NASDAQ:FUTU) stock plummeted on Friday following news of an investigation and massive proposed penalties by Chinese regulators, striking a blow to the digital brokerage. Unlicensed Trading Operations Shares of Futu Holdings, the online financial services giant behind the popular Moomoo and Futubull trading platforms, crashed nearly 28% on the Nasdaq. title: Nia Impact Advisors LLC Sells 9,619 Shares of Robinhood Markets, Inc. $HOOD
description: Nia Impact Advisors LLC reduced its stake in shares of Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD – Free Report) by 17.6% in the fourth quarter, Holdings Channel reports. title: 1 Profitable Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Find Risky
description: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

title: Tokens are still a sleeping giant
description: Stripe, BlackRock push tokenization beyond NFT hype as scalable blockchains like BSV gain traction for real-world finance and commerce.
